name: Top Secret Together
original_name: ได้ครับพี่ดีครับน้อง
overview: The story of 5 couples in which each of them there are concealed secrets. They have different meanings of love, both secret and love. Which path will they take? And how they will solve their problems?

trailers.title: Top Secret Together | Official Trailer | 5 BL couples' secret to the sweetest romance is…😘
